mapper.select: SELECT * FROM restaurants WHERE active=1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM orders WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND order_date=CURRENT_DATE
SELECT * FROM menu_categories WHERE restaurant_id=%s ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM menus WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND category_id=%s AND available=1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM menus WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND category_id IS NULL AND available=1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM menus WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND category_id=%s ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM addon_categories WHERE restaurant_id=%s ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM addons WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND category_id=%s AND available=1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM addons WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND category_id IS NULL AND available=1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM side_categories WHERE restaurant_id=%s ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM sides WHERE restaurant_id=%s AND category_id=%s AND available=1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT name FROM members WHERE active=1 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT name FROM members ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_date=CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY ordered_at
